CustomField.formula: IF( ISNULL(ts2__Resume_Last_Updated__c) , IMAGE("/resource/ts2__s_js", "No Resume") , HYPERLINK( IF($User.UIThemeDisplayed=='Theme3','','/one/one.app#/alohaRedirect')&'/apex/ts2__ShowResume?id='&Id, IMAGE("/resource/ts2__s_ResumeIcon", "Show Resume"), IF($User.UIThemeDisplayed == 'Theme3', '_blank', '_self') ) )
CustomField.label: Action
